results.rendered_html:
maṭacī f. viell. Hagel: ˚hateṣu kuruṣu  CHĀND. UP. 1,10,1 . maṭacyo 'śanayaḥ  ŚĀṂK. , maṭacyo mardanahetavo 'śanayaḥ pāṣāṇavṛṣṭayo vā  ĀNANDAGIRI.  = raktavarṇakṣudrapakṣīviśeṣaḥ (sic) . iti govindabhāṣyadhṛtacchāndogyaḥ  ŚKDR. 
— Vgl. maṭatī.
